info.title: Ed-Fi Operational Data Store API
info.description:
The Ed-Fi ODS / API enables applications to read and write education data stored in an Ed-Fi ODS through a secure REST interface. 
***
 > *Note: Consumers of ODS / API information should sanitize all data for display and storage. The ODS / API provides reasonable safeguards against cross-site scripting attacks and other malicious content, but the platform does not and cannot guarantee that the data it contains is free of all potentially harmful content.* 
***

get.summary: Retrieves specific resources using the resource's property values (using the "Get" pattern).
get.description: This GET operation provides access to resources using the "Get" search pattern.  The values of any properties of the resource that are specified will be used to return all matching results (if it exists).

parameters.name: localEducationAgencyId
parameters.description: The identifier assigned to a local education agency.

parameters.name: Use-Snapshot
parameters.description: Indicates if the configured Snapshot should be used.

200.description: The requested resource was successfully retrieved.

get.summary: Retrieves a specific resource using the resource's identifier (using the "Get By Id" pattern).
get.description: This GET operation retrieves a resource by the specified resource identifier.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A resource identifier that uniquely identifies the resource.

parameters.name: Use-Snapshot
parameters.description: Indicates if the configured Snapshot should be used.

200.description: The requested resource was successfully retrieved.

rel.description: Describes the nature of the relationship to the referenced resource.

href.description: The URL to the related resource.

localEducationAgencyId.description: The identifier assigned to a local education agency.

charterStatusDescriptor.description: A school or agency providing free public elementary or secondary education to eligible students under a specific charter granted by the state legislature or other appropriate authority and designated by such authority to be a charter school.

localEducationAgencyCategoryDescriptor.description: The category of local education agency/district.

nameOfInstitution.description: The full, legally accepted name of the institution.

shortNameOfInstitution.description: A short name for the institution.

stateEducationAgencyId.description: The identifier assigned to a state education agency.

webSite.description: The public web site address (URL) for the education organization.

_etag.description: A unique system-generated value that identifies the version of the resource.

_lastModifiedDate.description: The date and time the resource was last modified.

addressTypeDescriptor.description: The type of address listed for an individual or organization.    For example:  Physical Address, Mailing Address, Home Address, etc.)

streetNumberName.description: The street number and street name or post office box number of an address.

city.description: The name of the city in which an address is located.

stateAbbreviationDescriptor.description: The abbreviation for the state (within the United States) or outlying area in which an address is located.

postalCode.description: The five or nine digit zip code or overseas postal code portion of an address.

nameOfCounty.description: The name of the county, parish, borough, or comparable unit (within a state) in                       'which an address is located.

educationOrganizationIdentificationSyste.description: The school system, state, or agency assigning the identification code.

identificationCode.description: A unique number or alphanumeric code that is assigned to an education organization by a school, school system, state, or other agency or entity.

institutionTelephoneNumberTypeDescriptor.description: The type of communication number listed for an individual or organization.

telephoneNumber.description: The telephone number including the area code, and extension, if applicable.

schoolId.description: The identifier assigned to a school.

nameOfInstitution.description: The full, legally accepted name of the institution.

schoolTypeDescriptor.description: The type of education institution as classified by its primary focus.

shortNameOfInstitution.description: A short name for the institution.

webSite.description: The public web site address (URL) for the education organization.

_etag.description: A unique system-generated value that identifies the version of the resource.

_lastModifiedDate.description: The date and time the resource was last modified.

addressTypeDescriptor.description: The type of address listed for an individual or organization.    For example:  Physical Address, Mailing Address, Home Address, etc.)

streetNumberName.description: The street number and street name or post office box number of an address.

city.description: The name of the city in which an address is located.

stateAbbreviationDescriptor.description: The abbreviation for the state (within the United States) or outlying area in which an address is located.

postalCode.description: The five or nine digit zip code or overseas postal code portion of an address.

nameOfCounty.description: The name of the county, parish, borough, or comparable unit (within a state) in                       'which an address is located.

category.description: The classification of the education agency within the geographic boundaries of a state according to the level of administrative and operational control granted by the state.

educationOrganizationIdentificationSyste.description: The school system, state, or agency assigning the identification code.

identificationCode.description: A unique number or alphanumeric code that is assigned to an education organization by a school, school system, state, or other agency or entity.

institutionTelephoneNumberTypeDescriptor.description: The type of communication number listed for an individual or organization.

telephoneNumber.description: The telephone number including the area code, and extension, if applicable.

localEducationAgencyId.description: The identifier assigned to a local education agency.

category.description: The one or more categories of school.

gradeLevelDescriptor.description: The grade levels served at the school.

localCourseCode.description: The local code assigned by the School that identifies the course offering provided for the instruction of students.

sectionIdentifier.description: The local identifier assigned to a section.

availableCredits.description: The value of credits or units of value awarded for the completion of a course.

educationalEnvironmentDescriptor.description: The setting in which a student receives education and related services.

localCourseTitle.description: The descriptive name given to a course of study offered in the school, if different from the course title.

maximumAvailableCreditTypeDescriptor.description: The type of credits or units of value awarded for the completion of a course.

sequenceOfCourse.description: When a section is part of a sequence of parts for a course, the number of the sequence. If the course has only one part, the value of this section attribute should be 1.

_etag.description: A unique system-generated value that identifies the version of the resource.

_lastModifiedDate.description: The date and time the resource was last modified.

schoolId.description: The identifier assigned to a school.

classroomIdentificationCode.description: A unique number or alphanumeric code assigned to a room by a school, school system, state, or other agency or entity.

classPeriodName.description: An indication of the portion of a typical daily session in which students receive instruction in a specified subject (e.g., morning, sixth period, block period, or AB schedules).

schoolId.description: The identifier assigned to a school.

schoolYear.description: The identifier for the school year.

termDescriptor.description: An descriptor value indicating the term.

sessionName.description: The identifier for the calendar for the academic session.

beginDate.description: Month, day, and year of the first day of the session.

endDate.description: Month, day and year of the last day of the session.

totalInstructionalDays.description: The total number of instructional days in the school calendar.

staffUniqueId.description: A unique alphanumeric code assigned to a staff.

enrollmentBeginDate.description: Month, day, and year of the student's entry or assignment to the section.

enrollmentEndDate.description: Month, day, and year of the withdrawal or exit of the student from the section.

studentUniqueId.description: A unique alphanumeric code assigned to a student.

firstName.description: A name given to an individual at birth, baptism, or during another naming ceremony, or through legal change.

hispanicLatinoEthnicity.description: An indication that the individual traces his or her origin or descent to Mexico, Puerto Rico, Cuba, Central, and South America, and other Spanish cultures, regardless of race. The term, "Spanish origin," can be used in addition to "Hispanic or Latino."

lastSurname.description: The name borne in common by members of a family.

loginId.description: The login ID for the user; used for security access control interface.

personalTitlePrefix.description: A prefix used to denote the title, degree, position, or seniority of the individual.

staffUniqueId.description: A unique alphanumeric code assigned to a staff.

_etag.description: A unique system-generated value that identifies the version of the resource.

_lastModifiedDate.description: The date and time the resource was last modified.

staffClassificationDescriptor.description: The titles of employment, official status, or rank of education staff.

educationOrganizationId.description: The identifier assigned to an education organization.

electronicMailTypeDescriptor.description: The type of email listed for an individual or organization. For example: Home/Personal, Work, etc.)

electronicMailAddress.description: The electronic mail (e-mail) address listed for an individual or organization.

staffIdentificationSystemDescriptor.description: A coding scheme that is used for identification and record-keeping purposes by schools, social services, or other agencies to refer to a staff member.

identificationCode.description: A unique number or alphanumeric code assigned to a staff member by a school, school system, a state, or other agency or entity.

languageDescriptor.description: A specification of which written or spoken communication is being used.

raceDescriptor.description: The general racial category which most clearly reflects the individual's recognition of his or her community or with which the individual most identifies. The way this data element is listed, it must allow for multiple entries so that each individual can specify all appropriate races.

telephoneNumberTypeDescriptor.description: The type of communication number listed for an individual or organization.

orderOfPriority.description: The order of priority assigned to telephone numbers to define which number to attempt first, second, etc.

telephoneNumber.description: The telephone number including the area code, and extension, if applicable.

birthDate.description: The month, day, and year on which an individual was born.

firstName.description: A name given to an individual at birth, baptism, or during another naming ceremony, or through legal change.

lastSurname.description: The name borne in common by members of a family.

middleName.description: A secondary name given to an individual at birth, baptism, or during another naming ceremony.

personalTitlePrefix.description: A prefix used to denote the title, degree, position, or seniority of the individual.

studentUniqueId.description: A unique alphanumeric code assigned to a student.

_etag.description: A unique system-generated value that identifies the version of the resource.

_lastModifiedDate.description: The date and time the resource was last modified.

loginId.description: The login ID for the user; used for security access control interface.

sexDescriptor.description: The student's gender as last reported to the education organization.

hispanicLatinoEthnicity.description: An indication that the individual traces his or her origin or descent to Mexico, Puerto Rico, Cuba, Central, and South America, and other Spanish cultures, regardless of race, as last reported to the education organization. The term, "Spanish origin," can be used in addition to "Hispanic or Latino."

educationOrganizationId.description: The identifier assigned to an education organization.

languageDescriptor.description: A specification of which written or spoken communication is being used.

raceDescriptor.description: The general racial category which most clearly reflects the individual's recognition of his or her community or with which the individual most identifies as last reported to the education organization. The data model allows for multiple entries so that each individual can specify all appropriate races.

entryGradeLevelDescriptor.description: The grade level or primary instructional level at which a student enters and receives services in a school or an educational institution during a given academic session.

enrollmentBeginDate.description: The month, day, and year on which an individual enters and begins to receive instructional services in a school.

enrollmentEndDate.description: The recorded exit or withdraw date for the student.

schoolId.description: The identifier assigned to a school.

nameOfInstitution.description: The full, legally accepted name of the institution.

Created.description: The resource was created.  An ETag value is available in the ETag header, and the location of the resource is available in the Location header of the response.

Updated.description: The resource was updated.  An updated ETag value is available in the ETag header of the response.

NotModified.description: The resource's current server-side ETag value matched the If-None-Match header value supplied with the request indicating the resource has not been modified.

BadRequest.description: Bad Request. The request was invalid and cannot be completed. See the response body for specific validation errors. This will typically be an issue with the query parameters or their values.

Unauthorized.description: Unauthorized. The request requires authentication. The OAuth bearer token was either not provided or is invalid. The operation may succeed once authentication has been successfully completed.

Forbidden.description: Forbidden. The request cannot be completed in the current authorization context. Contact your administrator if you believe this operation should be allowed.

NotFound.description: The resource could not be found.

NotFoundUseSnapshot.description: The resource could not be found. If Use-Snapshot header is set to true, this response can indicate the snapshot may have been removed.

Conflict.description: Conflict.  The request cannot be completed because it would result in an invalid state.  See the response body for details.

PreconditionFailed.description: The resource's current server-side ETag value does not match the supplied If-Match header value in the request. This indicates the resource has been modified by another consumer.

Error.description: An unhandled error occurred on the server. See the response body for details.

offset.name: offset
offset.description: Indicates how many items should be skipped before returning results.

limit.name: limit
limit.description: Indicates the maximum number of items that should be returned in the results.

MinChangeVersion.name: minChangeVersion
MinChangeVersion.description: Used in synchronization to set sequence minimum ChangeVersion

MaxChangeVersion.name: maxChangeVersion
MaxChangeVersion.description: Used in synchronization to set sequence maximum ChangeVersion

If-None-Match.name: If-None-Match
If-None-Match.description: The previously returned ETag header value, used here to prevent the unnecessary data transfer of an unchanged resource.

fields.name: fields
fields.description: Specifies a subset of properties that should be returned for each entity (e.g. "property1,collection1(collProp1,collProp2)").

queryExpression.name: q
queryExpression.description: Specifies a query filter expression for the request. Currently only supports range-based queries on dates and numbers (e.g. "schoolId:[255901000...255901002]" and "BeginDate:[2016-03-07...2016-03-10]").

oauth2_client_credentials.description: Ed-Fi ODS/API OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials Grant Type authorization
